title: dioscorea ochroleuca
intro: Dioscorea ochroleuca, also known as the white yam or yam of the Andes, is a type of plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family of plants. Dioscorea ochroleuca has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have various health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving insulin sensitivity, and reducing the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions. Additionally, Dioscorea ochroleuca is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis, diabetes, and heart disease.
